findings.location: s1 — UserForm code block, validateForUpdateUser comment
findings.description: The comment inside the code block was changed from the source. Source says `// 合わせて11文字以上なら精査エラー` (≥11 characters), but the knowledge file says `// 合計11文字超過でエラー` (>11 characters). These have different semantics (以上 = ≥, 超過 = >), even though the actual condition `> 11` technically supports the knowledge file wording.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `// 合わせて11文字以上なら精査エラー` / Knowledge file: `// 合計11文字超過でエラー`
